description: Router-only benchmark for one user turn that implies multiple tool targets in the curated medium 50-server catalog.

cases.user_intent: List Aiven services, store the identifiers in Redis, and create a Stripe invoice for the customer.

subtasks.tool_intent: list all services in a specific Aiven project
tools to add, remove and list set members
creates a new invoice in Stripe

cases.user_intent: Fetch Datadog events, open a Git branch for the fix, and message the user directly in Discord.

subtasks.tool_intent: fetch events within a time range
send a Discord direct message to a user

cases.user_intent: Search Airtable records, review the customer in HubSpot, and unblock them in Telegram.

subtasks.tool_intent: search for records containing specific text
